title: clinopodium flabellifolium
intro: Clinopodium flabellifolium, also known as Mexican oregano, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It is a member of the mint family and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Mexican oregano can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being added to food for its flavor and aroma.
